events.title: JP review of pilots + pipeline-analysis deck
events.notes: First time JP sees outputs from the pipeline run on 3 real companies (Bodai, Ascenso, Scarab). Material: Pilotos/Nexostrat_Analisis_Pipeline.html + 3 executive summaries. Blocks the service-model decision.

events.title: Nexostrat service-model decision A / B / Hybrid (with JP)
events.notes: Strategic decision defining the next 6-12 months (CAC, LTV, channels, average ticket). Blocks the capabilities catalog and the pre-meeting one-pager.

events.title: Nexostrat real-capabilities catalog (1-pager: price + timeline + stack)
events.notes: Input for future discovery-meeting invocations. Without it, the guides keep selling vapor (QWs not validated against real delivery capacity).

events.title: Public pre-meeting one-pager template
events.notes: Marketing material to secure the meeting. Current gap: we have internal analysis + confidential script, but nothing to open the door.

events.title: Validate the 8 pipeline improvements before the 4th pilot run
events.notes: Before running the pipeline on another real company, validate the improvements in a controlled mini-pilot.

events.title: Confidence marking ✓/~/? in company-analyst
events.notes: Small edit to SKILL.md so output figures are marked by confidence level.

events.title: Skill #5: Diagnostic Report (post-meeting, real client data)
events.notes: Covers stage #9 of the full pipeline. Natural gate: first real client moving from meeting to diagnostic.

events.title: Skill #6: Commercial Proposal / SOW
events.notes: Covers stage #10 of the full pipeline. Closes the pre-implementation commercial cycle.
